shipped.description: Semantic consistency testing for AI agents — run k times, measure semantic equivalence, CI-gateable ConsistencyScore with 4 criticality tiers (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW).
shipped.pypi_status: READY_TO_PUBLISH — needs PyPI account + OIDC trusted publishing setup
shipped.key_differentiator: First pip-installable tool producing a named ConsistencyScore (semantic pass@k) as a CI-gateable metric with task-criticality-tier thresholds. AgentAssay answers a different question (sampling efficiency). SelfCheckGPT is hallucination detection, not consistency measurement.
shipped.bibleworld_pattern: PAT-062 (Numbers 23:19 — Does he speak and then not act? Cross-run consistency as an empirically verifiable property)
shipped.competitive_status: GREEN — confirmed 2026-03-31 via 4 live searches. 15+ tools audited: AgentAssay (adjacent, different question), SelfCheckGPT (hallucination detection, not consistency), DeepEval/Promptfoo (no pass@k metric), τ-bench (research only). No pip-installable competitor.
shipped.bug_also_fixed: cot-fidelity IDF smoothing bug — math.log(2.0/df + 1e-9) → math.log(1.0 + 2.0/df). Now 124/124 tests pass.
shipped.next_step: Push to GitHub repo buildworld-ai/semantic-pass-k, publish to PyPI, launch HN

shipped.description: Counterfactual suppression test for CoT faithfulness — run with CoT, run without, embed outputs, measure cosine delta. FAITHFUL/UNFAITHFUL/INCONCLUSIVE verdict.
shipped.pypi_status: READY_TO_PUBLISH — IDF smoothing bug fixed this cycle
shipped.bug_fix: IDF formula was math.log(2.0/df + 1e-9) — near-zero for terms in both docs. Fixed to math.log(1.0 + 2.0/df) (smoothed IDF).

shipped.description: LLM context window positional auditor — tests whether your LLM retrieves information from every position.
Astro web app for Ghana market intelligence

revenue_status.cumulative_tests: 1371 passing across 16 Python packages + 1 Astro web app
revenue_status.note: 17 products code-complete. PyPI deployment is the CRITICAL BLOCKER. Manual step required: PyPI account + GitHub org buildworld-ai + OIDC trusted publishing.
revenue_status.deployment_blocker: PyPI account creation needed. All 16 Python packages are READY_TO_PUBLISH. OIDC Trusted Publishing via pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish is the 2026 standard — no stored API tokens.
revenue_status.hn_launch_sequence: semantic-pass-k first (aligned with current TAM moment — arXiv 2602.16666 documented consistency gap Feb 2026). Then model-parity (8.90), cot-fidelity (8.85), chain-probe (8.85).

currently_building.status: 17 PRODUCTS CODE-COMPLETE — waiting for PyPI/GitHub deploy
currently_building.next_build: context-trace v0.1.0 (BibleWorld Cycle 020 winner, score 8.225). Spec complete in BibleWorld (.Codex/builds/ or build-registry.md BUILD-019). John 3:8 — per-context-chunk causal AttributionScore.

cycle_20_summary.competitive_verdict: GREEN — No pip-installable ConsistencyScore tool with criticality tiers. AgentAssay = different question. SelfCheckGPT = hallucination detection. τ-bench = research only. Window: 3-6 months.
cycle_20_summary.build_architecture: ConsistencyEngine (TF-IDF + neural) + ConsistencyRunner (k runs orchestration) + ConsistencyReport (aggregate) + ConsistencyStore (SQLite) + @consistency_probe (decorator) + assert_consistent (pytest) + CLI (run/report/ci/budget) + SemPassConfig (YAML)
cycle_20_summary.idf_fix_note: Smoothed IDF log(1 + N/df) prevents near-zero weights in 2-doc corpora. Applied to both cot-fidelity (fix) and semantic-pass-k (new).

pipeline.next_build: context-trace (BibleWorld BUILD-019, Pivot_Score 8.225) — per-context-chunk causal attribution for LLM outputs. John 3:8 (PAT-068). Green window: 4-6 months.
pipeline.decision_gate: CRITICAL — Deploy to PyPI first. Without live packages, zero distribution. After 100+ installs on any tool: continue building. Under 100 in 3 weeks: evaluate GrantPilot pivot (zero-capital path confirmed).

deployment_blocker.status: CRITICAL — all 17 products are PyPI-ready but not live. Zero distribution without this.
deployment_blocker.what_is_needed: 1. PyPI account (pypi.org). 2. GitHub org buildworld-ai. 3. 16 GitHub repos (one per Python package). 4. OIDC Trusted Publishing on PyPI for each. 5. Tag v0.1.0 → CI publishes automatically. 6. Vercel deploy for ghanascope.
deployment_blocker.manual_steps_required: YES — outside automated build loop. The Builder must execute these steps.

hn_post_templates.semantic-pass-k: Show HN: semantic-pass-k — Does your AI agent give consistent answers? Run it k times and measure (github.com/buildworld-ai/semantic-pass-k)
hn_post_templates.model-parity: Show HN: model-parity — Certify your replacement LLM is behaviorally equivalent before you migrate
hn_post_templates.cot-fidelity: Show HN: cot-fidelity — Is your LLM's chain-of-thought actually causal? The counterfactual suppression test

to_bibleworld.build_status: semantic-pass-k v0.1.0 COMPLETE — 177/177 tests pass. 17 tools total, 1371 Python tests passing.
to_bibleworld.cot_fidelity_fix: IDF smoothing bug fixed in cot-fidelity this cycle. math.log(1.0 + 2.0/df) is the correct formula for 2-doc corpora. Applied to semantic-pass-k as well.
to_bibleworld.semantic_pass_k_confirmation: GREEN confirmed via 4 live searches 2026-03-31. 15+ tools audited. No pip-installable ConsistencyScore with criticality tiers. Window: 3-6 months.

to_bibleworld.competitive_intel_2026: SelfCheckGPT samples multiple completions but for hallucination detection, not semantic equivalence. UQLM is uncertainty quantification. Neither is a ConsistencyScore tool. Semantic-pass-k gap confirmed clear.
